message:
chore(phase2c): refresh compat-closure attestation + evidence pack

Re-runs the COMPAT-CLOSURE-I attestation pipeline and records the
fresh output. Only the timestamps, env_fingerprint, file hashes
for FP-P2C-001 (parity_mismatch_corpus.json, parity_report*.json,
raptorq.json), and the attestation signature move; the
all_checks_passed, coverage_percent, strict_zero_drift flags all
remain true / 100 / true respectively, confirming the attestation
gate still passes with the new conformance code.

Pure regenerated artifact - no pipeline changes - committed so
the repo's compat-closure signature matches the current
reproducibility ledger.

files.patch:
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 {
   "claim_id": "COMPAT-CLOSURE-I/attestation",
-  "generated_unix_ms": 1775788179854,

   "all_checks_passed": true,
   "coverage_percent": 100,
   "strict_zero_drift": true,
   "hardened_allowlisted_total": 2,

-  "attestation_signature": "sha256:79f4c3c95a4a8b011a0a4d4f2939a62f82edf9424812a6a513a3d9c01bbbd9c5",
+  "attestation_signature": "sha256:534c631ad129cf96db1f742d555f6eddbc32a300ede19f1938c765707c3c0e35",
   "evidence_pack_path": "artifacts/phase2c/compat_closure_final_evidence_pack.json",
   "migration_manifest_path": "artifacts/phase2c/compat_closure_migration_manifest.json"
 }
